module_design.design_summary: In _cli_main, when dims_result is None (no valid K-date rows), change note from hardcoded "포장반" to note = kit_place to preserve variant values like "당일 포장반" and match GUI behavior.
module_design.interface_contract: Input: kit_place (str) from kit_row; dims_result from lookup_packing_dimensions (str or None) Output: note (str) — when dims_result is None, note = kit_place (dynamic value, not hardcoded "포장반") Validation: note used downstream for output reporting; must preserve exact kit_place string
module_design.implementation_plan: 1. Locate: else: note = "포장반" in _cli_main (dims_result None branch) 2. Replace with: note = kit_place 3. Keep dims_result-is-str branch unchanged: note = f"포장반 ({dims_result})"
module_design.verification_plan: T4 test: _cli_main block contains "note = kit_place" AND does NOT contain "note = \"포장반\""
